$meta.name: Path of Ambition — Character Schema
$meta.principle: Two-layer state: a character file stores ONLY player choices and current pool values. Every maximum, modifier, and derived number is recomputed from the content data (professions/origins/spells/items/shared) on every load — nothing derived is ever saved.
derived_not_stored: attribute/skill point budgets, feat slot allowances
all four defenses, vitality max, wounds max, ambition max + die size
resource maxima (formula fields on profession/universal resources)
skill pools/ranks/die sizes, spell DC, reservoir max, known/prepared allowances
carry capacity, item stats (resolved from catalog via catalog_item_id)
display names for profession/origin/vocation (resolved by id)

fields.id: string — unique character id (uuid or slug)
fields.schema_version: number — for the export/import migration pipeline

build.attributes: { brawn, finesse, mind, will } — final allocated base values (vocation bonus applied on top at compute)

skills.proficiencies: string[] — V.I.T.A.L.S. names picked as Trained
skills.points: Record<skill, number> — extra skill dice allocated
skills.expertise_bumps: Record<skill, number> — rank bumps beyond Trained

build.feat_ids: string[] — purchased feat ids (tier>0). Starting feats (tier 0) derive from profession/origin/vocation.
build.choices: Record<choiceKey, string|string[]> — selections for choice/multi_choice/daily-independent picks, keyed by the boon `key`
build.spellcasting_modifier: "mind"|"will"|null — only when the grant offers a choice
build.prep: Record<featId, json> — per-feat preparation selections (bound weapon, augments, enchantments, daily inscriptions)

items.catalog_item_id: string|null — id in data/items catalog; null = custom item
items.name: string — display name (custom items) or catalog override
items.reduction_pool_current: number|null — shields only; max derives from catalog
items.custom: json|null — full stat block for non-catalog items (same shape as a catalog entry)

pools.resources: Record<resourceId, number> — current value per profession/feat resource
pools.reduction_pools: Record<sourceKey, number> — current value per character-level reduction pool boon

fields.conditions: Record<conditionId, number> — 3-letter ids from conditions.json; value = stack count (>=1 = active)

play.favorites: [{ type: "item"|"feat"|"spell", id }] — pinned to the quick panel
